name: PersistToDB
businessLogic: Retrieve the list of DepositAccountEntity objects from SlotsDTO using DEPOSIT_ACCOUNTS_LIST key; if the list is non-null and non-empty, save all entries via depositDomainLifeCycleRepository.

If DEPOSIT_ACCOUNTS_LIST is null or empty, retrieve a single DepositAccountEntity from SlotsDTO using DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT key; if non-null, wrap it in a list and save via depositDomainLifeCycleRepository; otherwise log a warning.
Retrieve DocumentDetailsEntity from SlotsDTO using DOCUMENT_DETAILS key; if non-null, wrap it in a list and save via documentDetailsRepository; otherwise log a warning.
Retrieve NoticeInstructionEntity from SlotsDTO using NOTICE_INSTRUCTION key; if non-null, wrap it in a list and save via noticeInstructionRepository.
